title: Name resolution issue with compound SELECTs and Common Table Expressions
description:
drh added on 2014-02-09 02:15:05:
SELECT statements in a compound SELECT other than the right-most SELECT are
unable to use common table expressions.  Example:
WITH RECURSIVE
  t1(x) AS (VALUES(2) UNION ALL SELECT x+2 FROM t1 WHERE x<20),
  t2(y) AS (VALUES(3) UNION ALL SELECT y+3 FROM t2 WHERE y<20)
SELECT x FROM t1 EXCEPT SELECT y FROM t2 ORDER BY 1;
The query above is suppose to return all even integers less than 20 that are
not divisible by 3.  But instead we get a message: "no such table: t1".
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE numbers (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER NOT NULL);
WITH RECURSIVE t1(x) AS (SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value < 20 UNION ALL SELECT x + 2 FROM t1 WHERE x < 20) SELECT x FROM t1;
CREATE TABLE divisors (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, divisor INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT x FROM (WITH RECURSIVE t1(x) AS (SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value < 20 UNION ALL SELECT x + 2 FROM t1 WHERE x < 20) SELECT x FROM t1) AS even_numbers EXCEPT SELECT divisor FROM divisors;
key_bug_features: Compound SELECTs cannot access common table expressions
